problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrocoagulation. Electrocoagulation for suspended particle removal directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Field pilot deployment with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
